name: MonitorControl
description: MonitorControl is an open source utility that lets you control your external display brightness, contrast, and volume directly from macOS — using keyboard shortcuts or a menu bar slider. Works with DDC/CI compatible monitors and Apple displays.

version_check.alt_sparkle_note: Also uses Sparkle (SUFeedURL in app bundle), but the GitHub API is the more reliable public endpoint.

notes: Open source (MIT). IMPORTANT: v4.2.0 will not auto-update on macOS Sequoia (macOS 15) due to a known issue with the Sparkle framework and Sequoia's security changes. Users on Sequoia must manually download and install v4.2.0+. Subsequent versions should auto-update normally once v4.2.0 is installed. The GitHub API provides structured, machine-readable version and release data, making it the preferred version check method.
